calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:18am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf, Jr.; Clerk J. Kong, D525, Not Reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.

Appellant: Glenn Lee appears in pro per
Respondent: Robert Lowe appears in pro per

Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Robert Stumpf, Jr.

Appellant informed the Court that his apartment number is wrong in the court file. His apartment is #4 not #104. The Court has the clerk to correct the apartment number in open court.

EXHR PICTURES

10:35am
Matter is submitted. Newly evidence retained.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS

Appellant: No Appearance by Glenn Lee
Respondent:Robert Lowe, appears as proper

9:17:
appeal is dismissed; no appearance by appellant. Matter is submitted.
